strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, including GISCollective and testing libraries
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and contact info, raising questions about professionalism or identity clarity
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in context of professional projects despite listed skills
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise environment
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep full-stack expertise, strong alignment with the required stack, and valuable experience in AI-agent development and internal tooling — all critical for the role. Their open-source work and engineering rigor further support suitability, though name inconsistency and limited evidence of key frameworks like Nest.js or Vitest warrant closer review.
